case_title: MARK ANTHONY CARANDANG VS. JIMMY LEE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $139.00 SERVED FEB-27-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JIMMY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2020 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,599.00 FILED BY CARANDANG, MARK ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JIMMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2020 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF MARK ANTHONY CARANDANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JIMMY LEE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER IRENE LEE. MS. LEE WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARANDANG, MARK ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, JIMMY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $214.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,214.00, SEE ATTACHMENT 1: STATEMENT OF DECISION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-01-2020 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY ORDER OF THE COURT. (506/JR)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-05-2020 AT 5:50 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JIMMY
